Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are asked to take a given DECLARE model and add new constraints to mitigate bias in a loan application review process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to identify potential bias Sensitive attributes like ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The model currently includes certain activities StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo But we need to introduce new activities such as

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: CheckApplicantRace or maybe RecordApplicantRace RecordApplicantGender RecordApplicantAge or CheckApplicantDemographics or CollectSensitiveInfo

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: ManualReview or BiasCheck as fairness check

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Approve Reject maybe RequestAdditionalInfo

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to define constraints that Ensure decision steps cannot immediately follow a sensitive attribute disclosure without a BiasMitigationCheck or manual review in between

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ensure that if a decision occurs for a sensitive applicant there is a ManualReview or BiasMitigationCheck that coexists in the trace

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Preserve the format Unary constraints like existence absence exactly_one init map activity to support 1 0 confidence 1 0 Binary constraints map source activity to dict of target support 1 0 confidence 1 0

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: First decide which new activities to introduce

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Bias mitigation step ManualReview

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Decision outcomes Approve Reject FinalDecision already exists

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We could just treat FinalDecision as the generic decision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The flow likely StartApplication maybe RequestAdditionalInfo then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We want to add constraints that after RecordSensitiveAttr we must have ManualReview before FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: responded_existence RecordSensitiveAttr ManualReview

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: precedence ManualReview FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: nonchainsuccession RecordSensitiveAttr FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: responded_existence if A occurs then B must occur at least once Thats appropriate

Name: Validation - PE
Text: precedence if B occurs then A must have occurred before Thats a good fairness rule

Name: Validation - PE
Text: nonchainsuccession ensures that final decision does not directly follow record sensitive attribute

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We might also want response ManualReview FinalDecision

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: We also want to add existence for ManualReview Might be too strict all traces must contain manual review Better not

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: We also may want Approve and Reject as separate decisions But we can just treat FinalDecision as the generic decision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can have chainresponse RecordSensitiveAttr ManualReview immediate and precedence ManualReview FinalDecision and nonchainsuccession RecordSensitiveAttr FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Combined with chainresponse ensures that the sequence is RecordSensitiveAttr ManualReview FinalDecision not allowing direct final decision after attribute

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus produce an updated dictionary with new keys responded_existence response precedence chainresponse nonchainsuccession
